content: qrcode 1.5.4 API: toDataURL(text, opts, cb) returns base64 PNG data URL, works in both Node and browser bundles (isomorphic — ships a browser field in package.json). toCanvas(canvasElement, text, opts, cb) renders directly into an HTML canvas element, browser-only, ideal for live client-side preview. toBuffer/toFile/toFileStream are Node-only (server-side Route Handler use). Default errorCorrectionLevel is 'M'; 'H' only needed when compositing a logo in the center (not needed per D-10, no logo). Promise-based usage (no callback) is supported via omitting the callback argument.
